steps.title: Identify the cause
steps.content: The passage explains why the frigatebird can move much faster than the pronghorn: features suited to flight limit top speed less than features suited to running on land. The blank must show that the speed difference results from that fact.

steps.title: Reject noncausal nouns
steps.content: B would make the difference a goal, C would make it a denial, and D is awkward with "of" and reverses the relationship. The remaining noun means a result caused by something else. The answer is A.
